seo.title: Building AI Chatbot with Mastra + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai chatbot with Mastra + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building AI chatbots with Mastra enables sophisticated conversational agents using workflows, knowledge retrieval, and seamless integrations. However, complex multi-turn conversations introduce risks like hallucination, PII leaks, and incoherent responses that can erode user trust. Vex provides essential guardrails as middleware to verify response accuracy, ensure safety, and maintain conversation coherence.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Chatbot Architecture with Mastra
architectureOverview.description:
Mastra chatbots typically feature an intent classification step that routes user input through workflow nodes for RAG retrieval, memory lookup, and LLM generation. Each node processes structured data with tools for external API calls and knowledge base queries. The pipeline maintains conversation state via Mastra's memory management, enabling context-aware multi-turn interactions.

Key components include the AgentExecutor that orchestrates workflow steps, VectorStore for semantic search, and ChatMemory for session persistence. Transitions between nodes must validate outputs to prevent malformed data propagation. Safety checks occur at response generation to filter harmful content before user delivery.

risks.name: Workflow step outputs not validated between transitions
risks.description: Mastra workflow nodes can pass malformed or incomplete data to downstream steps, causing agent confusion or infinite loops
risks.mitigation: Vex middleware validates JSON schemas and data completeness at each workflow transition

risks.name: Agent tool calls returning malformed data
risks.description: External API tools return inconsistent formats that break LLM parsing and response generation
risks.mitigation: Vex normalizes tool outputs to expected Pydantic schemas before agent processing

risks.name: Memory retrieval injecting stale context
risks.description: ChatMemory returns outdated session data, causing context drift in multi-turn conversations
risks.mitigation: Vex timestamps and relevance-scores memory chunks before LLM context injection

risks.name: Sync integration data causing agent confusion
risks.description: Real-time API data conflicts with knowledge base, creating contradictory context for LLM
risks.mitigation: Vex prioritizes and merges sync data with recency/confidence metadata
